question: What makes AVAA different from traditional recruitment agencies or job boards?
answer: AVAA is not just a job board; we are a dedicated employer-side resource management platform. While traditional methods often involve fragmented workflows and manual searching, our mission is to consolidate detailed IT talent profiles into a single, structured system. We provide an advanced, criteria-based filtering engine that allows you to identify professionals based on specific technical skills and project backgrounds, ensuring your selection process is efficient, transparent, and data-driven.

question: What types of IT professionals and services can I access through AVAA?
answer: We cover the full spectrum of the digital ecosystem. Whether you need to build a product from scratch or market an existing one, AVAA connects you with talent across: Web & Mobile Development (Frontend, Backend, Full-Stack, iOS, and Android developers), Design (UI/UX designers focused on user behavior and wireframing), Business Systems (Experts in CRM development and Workflow Automation), Digital Growth (Digital Marketing strategists and Social Media specialists), and Support (IT Support professionals for hardware and network maintenance).

question: How does AVAA help reduce the time spent on screening candidates?
answer: Our vision is to make the identification of IT talent streamlined and transparent. We achieve this by minimizing manual searching through our centralized architecture. Instead of sifting through vague resumes, our platform presents comprehensive profiles that detail technical skills and project experience. This allows you to utilize our filtering engine to instantly match candidates to your specific requirements, significantly reducing human error and hiring time.

question: Can AVAA help optimize our internal business operations, not just our software development?
answer: Absolutely. Beyond standard software development, we specialize in Business Systems & Automation. We can connect you with Automation Specialists who identify repetitive manual tasks and replace them with 'Autopilot' workflows. Additionally, we offer talent experienced in custom CRM development to help you centralize client data and streamline your internal communication, ensuring your organizational throughput increases alongside your technical capabilities.

question: Is AVAA suitable for finding talent for complex, scalable projects?
answer: Yes. Our platform is built on the vision of supporting scalable technology that adapts to evolving requirements. Whether you need a Full-Stack Developer for a cohesive turnkey product, or a Backend Developer to build a secure 'engine room' for a high-availability application, our detailed profiling ensures you find professionals capable of handling robust, enterprise-level architectures and complex integrations.

question: How do you reset your password?
answer: To reset your password, click "Forgot Password" on the login page and enter the email address associated with your account. You'll receive a password reset link within a few minutes — check your spam folder if it doesn't appear. Click the link, enter your new password, confirm it, and hit Save. For security reasons, the link expires after 24 hours. If you're already logged in and just want to change your password, you can do so under Account Settings → Security.

question: Billing & Invoices
answer: You can view and download all your invoices from the Billing & Invoices section under your account settings. Invoices are generated automatically at the start of each billing cycle. To update your payment method, click "Manage Payment" and enter your new card details. If you believe there's an error on an invoice or need a refund, please contact our support team with your invoice number and we'll look into it within 1-2 business days.
